title: MikroTik R11e-LTE7, LTE miniPCI-e modem, 2x u.Fl
description: The MikroTik R11e-LTE7 is an LTE modem in the miniPCIe card form factor that supports 4G LTE and 3G networks. It is suitable for RouterBoards and can serve as a drop-in replacement for the R11eL-FG621-EA, offering higher speeds , support for LTE bands 28 and 32 and a smaller size The modem supports LTE Cat. 7 offering 300Mbps downlink and 100Mbps uplink . It utilizes 2x2 MIMO on the downlink and carrier aggregation , which allows the simultaneous use of multiple LTE bands . This feature improves response times and connection stability in high-traffic areas and can enhance transmission efficiency in locations with weaker signal conditions. The device is equipped with (2) u.Fl connectors for connecting antennas
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, 3G (GSM) 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (38) 2600 MHz, (40) 2300 MHz,… Connectors and Interfaces Bus type miniPCI-e RF connectors (2) u.Fl Power Max. power consumption [W] 5
